ddls:
CREATE TABLE "health_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health statistic entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the data was collected */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sex of the population */,
  "age_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group of the population */,
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cause of DALYs */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "dalys_percent" REAL /* Percentage of DALYs for the given year */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the data */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data is the current version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_statistics_age_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_statistics_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_statistics_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_statistics_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_statistics_cause_id FOREIGN KEY ("cause_id") REFERENCES causes ("cause_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the location in square kilometers */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex category */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex category (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sex category */,
  "is_aggregated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sex category is an aggregated group (e.g., All) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range covered by the group (e.g., 0-14, 15-24) */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of the group */,
  "is_aggregated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the age group is an aggregated group (e.g., All) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the age group in the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "causes" (
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cause */,
  "cause_name" TEXT /* Name of the cause (e.g., Malaria, Heart Disease) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cause */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the cause (e.g., Infectious, Non-communicable) */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* International Classification of Diseases (ICD) code */,
  "is_aggregated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the cause is an aggregated group (e.g., All) */,
  "prevalence" REAL /* Prevalence rate of the cause */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cause_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the year (e.g., Q1, Q2) */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the year (e.g., Jan, Feb) */,
  "is_fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Indicates if the year is a fiscal year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string of user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
